records.title: the cancel button and header cart icon are visible
records.acText: On /checkout-step-one.html (Checkout: Your Information), standard_user sees the Cancel button and the header shopping-cart icon.

records.title: clicking the cancel button returns to the cart page
records.acText: On the Checkout: Your Information page, clicking Cancel returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html).

records.title: clicking the header cart icon returns to the cart page
records.acText: On the Checkout: Your Information page, clicking the header shopping-cart icon returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html).

records.title: the information form is reset after leaving and returning
records.acText: After entering First 'Jane', Last 'Doe', Postal '12345', leaving to the cart, and returning to the Checkout: Your Information page, all three fields are empty (form state not persisted).

records.title: cancelling with an empty form returns to the cart without a validation error
records.acText: With the form empty, clicking Cancel on the Checkout: Your Information page returns standard_user to the Cart page (/cart.html) with no validation error — Cancel does not enforce the required-field validation Continue does.
